mapper.select:
SELECT a.comname as comName, a.username as userName, a.usercode as userCode, a.groups, a.groupscode as groupsCode, sum(ck_jsl) as ckJsl, sum(ck_jsl_wcl) as ckJslWcl, sum(ck_wcl) as ckWcl, sum(ds_tjl) as dsTjl, sum(ds_wcl) as dsWcl, sum(ds_zfl) as dsZfl, sum(shougen) as shouGen, sum(hougen) as houGen, sum(tiaojie) as tiaoJie, sum(ja) as ja, sum(zl) as zl FROM acd_dangri_gzl_ry a WHERE a.groups is not null AND a.groupscode not in ('5101701','5101702','5101703') AND a.tjdate >= #{startDate} AND a.tjdate <= #{endDate}
AND a.comname like concat('%', #{comName}, '%')
AND a.groups like concat('%', #{groups}, '%')
AND a.username like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 ORDER BY comName desc
SELECT MAX(tjdate) FROM acd_dangri_gzl_ry WHERE groups IS NOT NULL AND groupscode NOT IN ('5101701','5101702','5101703')
